name: The Heroic Legend of America: Second Revolutionary War
short_description: America Second Revolutionary War from 1854 to 1865.
detailed_description:
赞助

欢迎支持这项工作，你的支持将使这个作品更加完善。



About the Game

I am currently writing a full-length historical novel. For more details, you can follow my Bilibili account: 爱奥尼尤斯Aionius

March 11, 2026

I have always held a belief in my creative work: before putting pen to paper, I must be certain that the story I am about to write has the power to influence the world; otherwise, I would not write it. I have spent over a decade researching, reflecting, and writing, and I am convinced—indeed, I was convinced from the very beginning, and this conviction has only grown stronger through the process—that this story is indeed a great one that deserves to be told.

I don't have any property, and I'm not making this game to get rich. In fact, working on this theme in China is like committing suicide, but I'm quite willing to do it. I don't recommend purchasing directly on Steam because it seems that I can't receive transfers from this platform in China. You can effectively support this work directly by scanning the QR codes of WeChat Pay and Alipay. Due to Internet restrictions, I don't have an account on any international payment platform.

The game has now been updated to version v1.20. Please note that usually, after a version update, due to the introduction of many new contents and mechanisms, old save files are not compatible with the new version, and you will need to start the story anew. Additionally, if there are some extremely important updates, a reinstallation of the game will be required. Special instructions will be given in the official announcements at that time. We hope everyone will pay close attention to the announcements to stay informed of the latest developments.

Fondly do we hope, fervently do we pray, that this mighty scourge of war may speedily pass away. Yet, if God wills that it continue until all the wealth piled by the bondsman's two hundred and fifty years of unrequited toil shall be sunk, and until every drop of blood drawn with the lash shall be paid by another drawn with the sword, as was said three thousand years ago, so still it must be said “the judgments of the Lord are true and righteous altogether.”——Abraham Lincoln

In a just place, I would be punished for lying, not for telling the truth... For every lie they tell, they owe a debt to the truth, which sooner or later must be paid.——Chernobyl

THE Kansas Section

From 1854 to 1865, the slave power invaded and ravaged Kansas for as long as ten years. Slaveholders from Virginia, South Carolina, Georgia, and Missouri, along with their mouthpieces, thugs, underlings, and lackeys, exposed their anti-human and evil nature in an extremely shameless manner, with frenzied postures and brutal means. The slave power burned, killed, raped, and plundered in Kansas, committing all manner of crimes. Countless towns and villages were reduced to scorched earth, massive amounts of property were looted, and vibrant lives were crushed like worthless weeds. Massacres of unarmed civilians and children occurred everywhere, and the only reason for their murder was that they did not support slavery. The beautiful prairie was turned into a living hell, and its horrors were shocking and unbearable to recount. At a time when truth was wantonly trampled upon and lives were ruthlessly destroyed, a group of brave abolitionists resolutely went to Kansas and launched a heroic armed struggle against the slave power. Countless heroic figures and deeds emerged during this period—and it is precisely for this reason that this remains the period of history that fascinates me the most.

2025-8-1

Those mouthpieces and thugs will deliberately dig up video recordings of the original demos that the author abandoned long ago, then deceive the public by claiming these are the "true" current state of the work.

Truly, anyone who understands my attitude toward creation should know that my rigor with details borders on obsession. Every design requires poring over countless documents, repeated research and cross-referencing. Just to make characters appear as they should in history, I would revise sketches dozens of times over a single detail in an eye expression. With such a creative process, how could I possibly allow my work to be treated like a trivial joke? How foolish must one be to believe such slander that can’t even get basic version information right? And how malicious must one be to launch such despicable attacks on a work infused with heartfelt dedication?

Of course, my work isn’t some so-called 3A blockbuster, nor has it been hyped with overwhelming publicity. The author has no capital backing, no reliance on power for support—instead, I’ve been restricted by capital, had posts deleted, accounts banned; I’ve been besieged and stigmatized by power and its lackeys. But I can say with a clear conscience that every detail in my work stands up to the scrutiny of integrity, and that’s enough. Truly valuable creation never needs empty, flashy packaging to grab attention. It must be steeped in humanistic heritage, capable of presenting facts, telling truths, and revealing principles through its lines—capable of evoking spiritual resonance in readers who engage with it wholeheartedly.

The author is accompanied only by a small group of upright individuals, and this is more precious to me than anything, more cause for joy than anything else.

I once again express my gratitude for their support.

2025-7-29

They also object to my praise for the conscience and courage of abolitionists, slandering my factual accounts and revelations as "black-and-white binary thinking" and "incitement of hatred."

These mouthpieces and thugs, while shouting "not a single Japanese is good" and "remember history" as they clamor for violence against Japan, are the same ones who oppose my efforts to expose the darkness and evils of American slavery and the truth about it, who object to my praise for the conscience and courage of abolitionists, and it is these same mouthpieces and thugs who have now twisted the truth to the point of labeling Lincoln as a "evil" while glorifying slave owners as "righteousness." These very same mouthpieces and thugs have gone to extremes to vilify me, relentlessly attacking and maliciously bombarding my works—which reveal the truth about slavery and the abolitionist movement—with slander and bad reviews.

It doesn’t take much thought to figure out what kind of scum these mouthpieces and thugs really are. They despise truth, kindness, and virtue because these things expose their hypocrisy, depravity, and utter wretchedness.

These mouthpieces and thugs are even frantically distorting and erasing the facts and truths of the present—how dare they have the audacity to preach about "remembering history"!

I will never submit to these extremely shameless acts of reversing black and white, and have fought against them for a long time. However, recently I have realized that things have reached a point where there is no need to pay attention to those hired thugs who post fake negative reviews and spread rumors and slander.

When a country has a soil where people can express their views normally, people's words are worthy of attention, and this is the prerequisite for people's opinions to be valued.

When a country does not allow normal people to speak, but instead imposes comprehensive and thorough suppression, silencing, blocking, limiting the flow, deleting posts, and banning accounts on authors. On the contrary, it encourages, indulges, sponsors, and incites a large number of hired thugs to use fake accounts and even AI to carry out large-scale and endless defamation and stigmatization of authors and their works.

May I ask, in such a situation, do we still need to care about them - more precisely, do we still need to care about the "opinions" of those hired thugs who are full of lies and extremely manic?

This situation where only praises to the powerful are allowed, while those with a conscience are severely attacked, reminds me of the history of slavery, autocracy and tyranny mentioned in this work, as well as the situations in the late years of many dynasties.

What happens next is left to history. I believe that history will give a fair evaluation, and truth will achieve a complete victory.

(This passage was written around the time a commercial film about the Nanjing Massacre was released in China. The movie drove many Chinese into a frenzy, with calls to "kill all Japanese," while those like me, who dared to oppose this madness, were also met with threats and attacks. This article has been censored across the Chinese internet—only an excerpt is shared here. Most of the other content on this page has also been banned domestically.)

2024-9-25

I am currently under all - round persecution and being stigmatized by various rumors spread by the mouthpieces and their henchmen. This game work is just a trivial example. Since childhood, I have repeatedly experienced the cost of speaking the truth, but I just can't help but keep saying it. For almost two decades, I have insisted on not compromising with evil in any field.

Do you know what the price of speaking the truth is in China? If you don't know, Americans, you can imagine what the abolitionists in the 19th century went through. But this is not America; this is China, where there is no tradition of freedom, equality, and democracy. A more similar situation is the Soviet Union, who has already met his downfall (I'm glad that the chief culprit met his end long ago).

Therefore, contemporary Americans, although you treat protest activities as commonplace, I cannot participate in such activities because they simply do not exist in China. Yet, I mock any protest activities you have now because the risks you face in your protests are not even a millionth of the risks I face just by writing these lines（As this is written, some unscrupulous lackeys in the United States are holding up signs in support of Hamas）. And over the past decade and a half, I have never stopped speaking out.

My situation, to be more specific - the environment for developing games is worlds apart from yours. I do not expect you to understand, and I even doubt whether many ignorant and foolish compatriots can understand this. It is precisely because of this that it is me, a Chinese person, someone who has relentlessly fought against evil and been persecuted, not you Americans or anyone else, who has the eyes to discover the deeds of these abolitionists, to empathize with their purity and courage, and to write such works.

2024-7-15

The First Chinese to Openly Support Ukraine

Are you the first Chinese person to come out in support of Ukraine?

I was indeed the first Chinese person to openly stand up on February 24, 2022, which is not only a source of pride but also has serious consequences or a heavy price - almost three years of continuous online violence since February 24, various special treatments, no longer allowed to express opinions about the Ukraine war, limited traffic on major video platforms, almost equivalent to a complete ban on the Internet, a persistent test of personal courage and physical and mental health, besides the glorious self-sacrifice, there is no and cannot be any material benefit, and in terms of reputation, it is almost entirely stigmatized.

On February 24, 2022, I was very clear about the consequences of doing so, but a sense of duty made me do it anyway. Since I am passionate about practicing my own principles, I did not consider retreating at all in this matter, not even a little bit. The so-called first person not only refers to the earliest pioneer who stood up, but more importantly, what price was paid for it - therefore, I would rather not go through all this and not have this title, just hoping for world peace, unfortunately, reality does not always turn out as we wish.

Now that you know these facts, how long will this article recording this event last without being censored? Even if only a few people see this information for a short time, I think it is enough, because I believe that any contribution and sacrifice for a just cause will have immeasurable effects in the future.

2025-4-9

What are the thoughts of those people who take revenge on society?

"They're not even retaliating against the ones who actually harmed them."

Is that really the case? Well, there are millions of shameless, morally disoriented, truth-distorting and extremely frenzied online mobs who have carried out cyberbullying against me. So, among them, which specific one is the culprit who has harmed me?

How can you quantify these crimes so as to allocate them to each culprit? Is it enough to just punish those masterminds who incite, lie and deceive them, while the accomplices and abettors can act as if nothing had happened, and just say "We were deceived" and feel at ease?

However, the masterminds have not received any punishment so far. On the contrary, they have made a fortune and thrived because of these criminal acts. And those accomplices are still accomplices, showing not the slightest sign of repentance. In fact, they are still committing these criminal acts today, right at this moment, and they never seem to get tired of it.

Therefore, although I will never be a "person who takes revenge on society", I fully understand the actions and motives of those "people who take revenge on society".

Just as a netizen commented:

"You can't just say 'There's nothing I can do but condemn' when he is the victim.

You can't just talk to him about 'rules' and 'innocence' when he becomes the perpetrator.

You question: Passers-by and students are innocent. Why take revenge on them?

The other person replies: I was innocent before too. Was I spared?

You question: If you take precise revenge on the prime culprit, at least you can be considered a hero.

The other person replies: The world has treated me like this. Why should I be a hero for it?"

"Let's calculate. The Russia-Ukraine conflict has been going on for more than three years. I dare not say there are millions accumulated in three years. After all, it seems that your traffic is not that high. But there must be at least ten thousand. So, I can understand why you are angry. I can truly understand."

No, you completely don't understand, because you're not in the situation, and you haven't seen the basic facts that I'm going to mention below before.

The quantity you envisioned is just a fraction of the actual quantity on the first day, February 24th, 2022. And the amount over these more than ten years is far beyond your imagination. Do you know why the traffic isn't that high? It's because I've been blocked. Do you really think that cyberbullying only counts when people leave abusive comments under my articles and videos? Under those videos that spread rumors about me, which one doesn't have tens of thousands of people following the trend to abuse and spread rumors? Isn't it like this on every platform? There are many platforms that you've never even heard of, and I couldn't have imagined them either. I only knew about them after seeing them. The only thing that's certain is that there must be even more situations that we can't imagine, because they are such a large group without any bottom line.

Many people really can't imagine a lot of things because they haven't experienced them.

So, how can we solve this? In fact, what I've been doing is trying to address the root cause of these evils, and this is precisely why I've been viciously attacked.

The root cause of these evils is too deeply ingrained, but there is only one way to go, which is to fight against it to the end.

It is a blessing to die for the cause of justice.

Development Work

Since 2009, fourteen years of careful research and conception. The game began to be produced in 2021.

This game features a large number of characters, as well as weapons, props, and troop types with the characteristics of the era. As the plot unfolds, rich gameplay will be gradually unlocked. As the first work to comprehensively reveal historical truths, it presents many unknown historical details. To be honest, I wouldn't mind writing the development process into a thick book, which might even contain more stories than the game itself. However, due to time constraints, I can only give a few examples here.

The Heroic Legend of America: Second Revolutionary War is an SRPG. You will return to the period from 1854 to 1865 and experience the grand and tumultuous history of the Second Revolutionary War.

In the 18th century, the American colonies rose up in resistance and won the revolutionary war. However, the claws of the slaveholding forces were stretching across the entire continent. When darkness once again enveloped the land, new heroes stepped forward.

☛Epic story, vast worldview, comprehensively showing the style of the world in the mid-19th century.

In 1831, William Lloyd Garrison raised the flag of liberation. In the following thirty years, abolitionists waged heroic struggles in the eastern region. In 1854, the center of the struggle shifted to Kansas in the west. Countless heroes emerged in this magnificent armed struggle. In 1861, the Second Revolutionary War broke out in full swing. The heroes who had fought in Kansas and the new recruits would fight side by side against the slaveholding forces, and the decisive battle between freedom and slavery thus began.

☛SRPG，Numerous characters and levels

More than 3,000 characters will appear! Currently, 28 heroes are available for selection, including Samuel Wood, Samuel Tappan, Daniel Anthony, John Doy, George Deitzler, Samuel Simpson, Samuel Walker, John Wakefield, Robert Buffum, Thomas Barber, Thomas Bickerton, John Brown, Edward Fitch, and James Abbott.

There are over 90 historical battles, such as Repel the Border Ruffians in Kansas (1854), Walker's Midnight Ride (1855), Protection Free Negro (1855), Battle of Black Jack (1856), Battle of Fort Franklin (1856), Fort Bain (1857), Set the slaves free (1858), Harpers Ferry (1859), Beating back the slave traders (1860), Bull Run (1861), Glorieta Pass (1862), Gettysburg (1863), New York City Draft Riots (1863), Wilderness (1864), and Appomattox (1865).

☛Weapons and Props with the Characteristics of the Era

There are various models of rifles, pistols, and swords for your heroes to use. You can also obtain such famous weapons as the Sharps rifle, which gained great fame in Kansas, the Sword of John Brown, and Abbott's howitzer.

☛Rich Troop Type

Characters with mounts can ride horses; cavalrymen can dismount to fight; artillery has multiple forms; supply wagons provide the necessary food and ammunition. Units like railway guns and ironclad ships will also make their appearances.

☛Elaborately Designed Skills

Each character has combat skills designed based on historical research. Professional skills, such as those of journalists, lawyers, doctors, and mechanics, will also play different roles. Besides, there are many unique skills featuring the characteristics of the era.

☛Many Exploreable Locations

Maps at three levels - national, state, and county - offer over a thousand exploreable locations. With carefully researched geographical locations, road conditions, thousands of characters, and a vast amount of plots all intertwined, this is the first time in history to restore that magnificent era. You need to explore carefully so as not to miss every single detail!

2024-12-28

2024-12-2

这几年世界上的诸多问题都是之前留下的后遗症。自从2019年大瘟疫以来，再发生什么，人们都不应该感到意外。这种后遗症，更确切地说，是与邪恶妥协的结果。历史上已经见过太多了，比如从美国建国到废奴运动开始前长达半个世纪对奴隶主的妥协。因此我一直践行不与邪恶妥协的原则，任何与邪恶妥协的行为只是在延续苦难的时间而已。矛盾爆发后，总要有个结果。而真理会获得最终胜利。

2024-10-11

当我提到自己被污名化时，我指的是一种复杂而痛苦的经历，它远远超出了谣言这个词所能描述的情况。

这里仅举一个例子：那是2012年，我是国内首屈一指的美利坚内战历史论坛创建者，我致力于介绍相关历史，并澄清大量历史谣言。中国人从那时就疯狂攻击美利坚，历史当然是不能错过的领域，为此它们还疯狂崇拜被它们视作美利坚的敌人的南方邦联奴隶主。当然，我正是看到这一现象，才决定在互联网发声，并致力于启蒙运动。当我和论坛的名气逐渐变大时，引来了许多上述恶棍的攻击，手段可以说无所不用其极，从单纯的辱骂、造谣，到大量制造垃圾信息扰乱论坛秩序，以及黑客攻击，之前我闻所未闻的恶行都是从那时开始见识到的。

然而，上述恶行尽管极为癫狂，却仍属于全世界的恶棍都会用的一些常规手段，唯独接下来要说的情况，不只是我曾经没有预料到，我相信中国之外的很多国家的人也想象不到的。

为了理解接下来的说明，这里我要额外提一句，我一直使用自己绘制的头像，我的用户名也是独一无二的（并且很有品味），因此很有辨识度，当时网络用户没有今天那么多，我在历史领域小有名气，还没被封杀，所以很多人听说过我，而恶棍们正是利用了这一点。

当时，有一些人质问我为什么在其他各大论坛发表许多奇怪的言论，或者大量制造垃圾信息扰乱那些论坛的秩序。当然，这些都是子虚乌有、我闻所未闻的事情。我有自己论坛，每天需要花费大量精力去更新，并抵御无休无止的骚扰，根本没有时间去逛别的论坛，况且那些论坛不是我感兴趣的领域。我以为这只它们传播的新谣言，不过我还是去它们提到的那些论坛看了一眼，结果看到偷了我的头像和用户名的恶棍，在那些论坛疯狂发表各种垃圾言论，其中一些是完全有悖于我一直以来秉持的良知、道德和立场的，另一些则是精心模仿我的语言风格，然后加入一些似是而非的观点混淆视听，让不明真相的人们误以为那些话真的出自于我之口。

我立刻意识到，这是一场有预谋的污名化行动。我很快便收集好证据，联系了论坛管理员和相关部门，然而这没有什么用，有的只是漠视。很显然，这种造谣的方式非常简单，又非常容易让人信以为真，而我的澄清却是费力和无效的。

需要注意的是，这种情况不是那些年的个例，而是大规模的，有组织的，长时间的。

同样的手段它们今天还在用。

就像我多年前感叹的，它们的下限是无底洞，只有我们想不到的，没有它们做不出的。

2024-10-20

如果未来回看现在的历史，2024年绝对是中国言论自由倒退的又一个重要分水岭。2022年乌克兰战争的开始可以说是近年来的自由权利的大倒退的起点，虽然言论自由从来都很少，然而2024年以来，却几乎说不了什么了。我一直在说，所以我比任何人都清楚，知道这些变化的每一个细节。当然，我的意见向来最激烈，所以我现在没有一个账号是正常可用的。可是那些温和的人现在也不敢说了，这再次印证了那句话，连温和的意见都不允许，剩下的全是癫狂的掌声了。好人不发声，恶棍叫嚷声铺天盖地，多么可耻的景象！

从昨天开始，中国人疯狂赞美死掉的哈马斯恐怖分子头目，赤裸裸将其称作英雄、圣人乃至当代耶稣，任何不同意见都会遭到彻底的清除。

这景象真让我忧心忡忡，夜不能寐！

2024-10-2

If the matter to be discussed below is important, it is only because it can fully reveal the hideous nature of those wicked villains, subservient lackeys and degenerate miscreants. Therefore, it is necessary to provide a detailed explanation here.

Although I have explained it countless times, many people still do not understand and frequently ask: why was the initial price set at 1400?

Without going into the details of how I spent the past decade sharing my historical research for free, refuting various fallacies, conducting enlightenment work, advocating for social issues without hesitation, and fearlessly standing up for justice on all fronts, thus incurring the animosity of various interest groups—to put it simply, it was because at the beginning of the project, I was threatened by mouthpiece who would smear my game with negative reviews.

At that time, I wanted to conduct a beta test for a Demo that was still in its conceptual stage. Due to my inexperience with game publishing, I was unaware that Steam had a specific channel for releasing betas and mistakenly published the conceptual Demo as a full version. In this situation, to prevent negative reviews, I first thought of setting an improbable price that no one would buy, and conducted the beta test through providing redemption codes to beta testers.

Then, the mouthpiece thugs carried out their threats to brush negative reviews, and we can see the nonsensical rumors and slander. It wasn't until then that I learned that those scoundrels could leave negative reviews after a refund; my high price setting was useless.

During the barrage of malicious attacks, numerous hypocritical individuals (or fraudulent accounts) pleaded with me to lower the price to what they considered a "reasonable range" of tens of yuan and promised to purchase. I have always been one to believe in the goodness of human nature rather than assume malice (although this has cost me dearly over the years). I followed their "advice", and in hindsight, this is one of the most regrettable things I have ever done in my life.

As many know, not a single person who promised to buy did so within a week. The sole purchase came from a scoundrel who had garnered a large following by recklessly commenting on pornographic games using AI voice. For this rogue, buying my game at a low price and then recording a video with AI voice to denigrate it was a highly profitable venture. The slanderous video quickly amassed hundreds of thousands of views, filling the rogue's pockets, while I was subjected to relentless online abuse from tens of thousands of ignorant and despicable internet trolls, which continues to this day. My video account was also repeatedly banned for debunking rumors.

In China, spreading rumors is rewarded while dispelling them leads to censorship; the wicked thrive while, the virtuous perish swiftly. This is another reality you must understand.

And those ignorant individuals would rather believe the most untrustworthy buffoons who blatantly distort and fabricate rumors than take a single glance at the truth, if they even have eyes. They hate facts and truth as if it would be the death of them.

为什么现在是568元？

因为据说中国人现在牛逼坏了、牛逼上天了！都很有钱！所以为了配合我天朝大国的气势，自然不能逊色于美元区，至少也要跟美元区持平！而不是自降身价，不然岂不是不爱国？

不愿为自己辩护的人，不配捍卫正义的事业

In a society filled with villains and fools, a courageous pioneer cannot fail to be called a clown, a madman, a psychopath, and a traitor, and cannot fail to be surrounded by countless vicious rumors. If this so-called peace is shrouded in countless vile lies, endless atrocities, and brutal oppression, I would rather die honorably in revolution than live a cowardly life in this false peace.

造谣得奖赏，辟谣被封杀｜一个正直的人竟能被喉舌打手抹黑歪曲到这种地步

这个作品首先是为了还原事实和真相，其次是为了体验杀死穷凶极恶、满嘴谎话的奴隶主及其走狗的过程（因为现实中大概率没机会，不过也不一定）。现实中谁会不乐意，谁会疯狂对作者人身攻击，刷差评，造谣诽谤？事实非常清楚，那些刷差评的全部都是当权者的喉舌打手，它们多年来通过各种手段不遗余力的对我进行污名化，并蒙骗和煽动那些不明真相的人。毫无疑问，它们很着急，它们很害怕。

我发现在重重打压和恶毒攻击、要什么缺什么的状态下，坚持做完一件事是最难的

我在各大平台的账号又被封了，限流的限流，我发声的努力看来毫无疑问是到头了。十多年的坚持不懈，这种英勇的行动创造的好影响会持续下去。

跟那些不发声的人不同，我是因为毫不畏惧的竭尽所能的发声才导致无声可发的；在为正义发声上，没有人比我说得更直言不讳；在这种直言不讳的基础上，没有人比我开始的时间更早，坚持的时间更长。

去年已经说过， 《美利坚英雄传说：第二次革命战争》 游戏开发没有资金继续。

我开发的游戏实际上是我的历史小说的一个简化的片段，“简化的片段”指的是故事时间跨度和文本量，而游戏本身需要的设计和大量素材绘制（全部是我一个人）更加耗费精力、金钱和健康，如前说述，就是这部分的开发成本令我难以承受。

这个小说暂定名为《美利坚大革命》，除非我想到更完美的名字。早年我在小说贴吧和网站发过一些，反响不错，毕竟作为“美国内战史第一人”，在国内，这个小说题材没有比我更早涉足的。但那是将近二十年前的事情，经过多年沉淀积累，今天我想讲的故事比过去的要更加沉重。为什么最近没再在线上发布过，原因很好猜，因为不过审。

顺便一提，为了筹集项目费用而注册的爱发电账号，不久前也毫不意外被封了，原因不需要再做解释。

这个故事令我深思熟虑了将近二十年，其中充满了激情、愤慨、怒火，废奴主义者和革命者崇高的英雄主义和人性光辉，还有美利坚奴隶主、欧罗巴专制君主等压迫者及其走狗龌龊的思想和卑劣的暴行，几千个历史人物， 以及两位为自由和平等的正义事业而斗争的美丽的年轻人——尼古拉斯·奥古斯汀和艾米莉·莫里斯（必不可少的主人公）。

如果日后这本长篇小说能出版，我会寄送给各位一直支持和鼓励的朋友一本，当然运费需要你来出，如果那时我还那么穷（大概率）。

只要还活着，人总是要有点希望和努力目标的。

那些卖国贼气急败坏的样子，最能说明这个游戏的价值，那些卖国贼的卑劣行径，更衬托出那些英雄的崇高。

This game features a large number of characters, as well as weapons, props, and troop types with the characteristics of the era. As the plot unfolds, rich gameplay will be gradually unlocked. As the first work to comprehensively reveal historical truths, it presents many unknown historical details. However, due to time constraints, I can only give a few examples here.

The Heroic Legend of America: Second Revolutionary War is an SRPG. You will return to the period from 1854 to 1865 and experience the grand and tumultuous history of the Second Revolutionary War.

In the 18th century, the American colonies rose up in resistance and won the revolutionary war. However, the claws of the slaveholding forces were stretching across the entire continent. When darkness once again enveloped the land, new heroes stepped forward.

☛Epic story, vast worldview, comprehensively showing the style of the world in the mid-19th century.

In 1831, William Lloyd Garrison raised the flag of liberation. In the following thirty years, abolitionists waged heroic struggles in the eastern region. In 1854, the center of the struggle shifted to Kansas in the west. Countless heroes emerged in this magnificent armed struggle. In 1861, the Second Revolutionary War broke out in full swing. The heroes who had fought in Kansas and the new recruits would fight side by side against the slaveholding forces, and the decisive battle between freedom and slavery thus began.

☛SRPG，Numerous characters and levels

More than 3,000 characters will appear! Currently, 28 heroes are available for selection, including Samuel Wood, Samuel Tappan, Daniel Anthony, John Doy, George Deitzler, Samuel Simpson, Samuel Walker, John Wakefield, Robert Buffum, Thomas Barber, Thomas Bickerton, John Brown, Edward Fitch, and James Abbott.

There are over 90 historical battles, such as Repel the Border Ruffians in Kansas (1854), Walker's Midnight Ride (1855), Protection Free Negro (1855), Battle of Black Jack (1856), Battle of Fort Franklin (1856), Fort Bain (1857), Set the slaves free (1858), Harpers Ferry (1859), Beating back the slave traders (1860), Bull Run (1861), Glorieta Pass (1862), Gettysburg (1863), New York City Draft Riots (1863), Wilderness (1864), and Appomattox (1865).

☛Weapons and Props with the Characteristics of the Era

There are various models of rifles, pistols, and swords for your heroes to use. You can also obtain such famous weapons as the Sharps rifle, which gained great fame in Kansas, the Sword of John Brown, and Abbott's howitzer.

☛Rich Troop Type

Characters with mounts can ride horses; cavalrymen can dismount to fight; artillery has multiple forms; supply wagons provide the necessary food and ammunition. Units like railway guns and ironclad ships will also make their appearances.

☛Elaborately Designed Skills

Each character has combat skills designed based on historical research. Professional skills, such as those of journalists, lawyers, doctors, and mechanics, will also play different roles. Besides, there are many unique skills featuring the characteristics of the era.

☛Many Exploreable Locations

Maps at three levels - national, state, and county - offer over a thousand exploreable locations. With carefully researched geographical locations, road conditions, thousands of characters, and a vast amount of plots all intertwined, this is the first time in history to restore that magnificent era. You need to explore carefully so as not to miss every single detail!

这个游戏中的那些历史上的英雄和烈士们，时刻都在用他们崇高的精神和事迹，讽刺着当代那些披着精英的画皮的类人物种的卑劣思想和行径。这就不难理解为何那些类人物种对这个游戏如此仇恨，因为它们从历史的镜子里看到了自己丑恶的嘴脸，它们发现自己跟游戏中的那些恶棍和走狗一模一样，因此恼羞成怒，发了疯地贬低这个作品，煽动那些打手对作者进行人身攻击。

就像真正的英雄主义是没有国界之分的，卖国贼在任何国家和时代也有着相同的嘴脸。

什么是卖国贼，卖国贼是损害国家利益而求取私利的人。国家，国民的国家，国民就是国家。打压国民，迫害国民，奴役国民，让国民保持愚昧，就是卖国贼。

那些卖国贼将通过非法手段强取豪夺来的钱财转移到美国，却还煽动国人仇恨美国，没错，靠说谎煽动仇恨割流量韭菜就是其中一种获取钱财的非法手段。

这是历史上第一个被卖国贼所痛恨的游戏，作者除了饱受上述卖国贼们攻击之外，没有也不可能有什么收益，卖国贼却总是能通过对这个游戏的造谣诽谤割流量韭菜。即使是从历史的角度来看，揭露事物本质的人和作品在当时也往往得不到多数人的赞赏，反而会遭到恶棍的围攻。

那些卖国贼气急败坏的样子，最能说明这个游戏的价值，那些卖国贼的卑劣行径，更衬托出那些英雄的崇高。

我们的敌人不在外部，而在内部，我们的敌人不是美国，而是那些还在把钱转移到上述国家的卖国贼，是还在试图跑到上述国家的卖国贼。只要这样的恶棍在我们的国家继续兴风作浪，我们的国家便没有希望，我们国家的穷人便没有希望。

卖国贼不希望国民了解事实真相，了解什么是真正的人类的良知，什么是真正的英雄主义，因为这会让那些恶棍无法继续兴风作浪，继续奴役国民。

除了外部环境带来的困难，这个游戏的制作成本也一直困扰着我。我究竟该如何筹集开发资金？当然，较高的售价用处不大，可是众筹也无人问津。只有在被那些类人物种攻击的时候，这个项目才会成为被关注对象。不过我知道并不是所有人都像那些类人物种一样满脑子秽物，内心充满了各种阴暗的目的。这个社会还是存在一些希望的。

只要能展现什么是真正的人类良知，什么是真正的英雄主义，只要能继续揭示历史真相，能揭露类人物种的丑恶嘴脸，这个游戏就应该被更多人看到。你们的支持对这个项目接下来的开发至关重要。
